overview: Credit Bridge is a professional fintech-style credit and collection management app for Indian shop owners, supporting multiple currencies, bilingual EN/HI, and now with LenDenClub-style transaction history and email notifications.
features: Transaction history page with Dr/Cr cards, filters, sort, and CSV download
Email notifications for payment confirmation and daily due reminders
Customer email field for personalized notifications
LenDenClub-style transaction cards across all pages
Interest and fixed daily repayment tracking
Super admin panel with full control
